stop.command: bash -lc 'root="$PWD"; if [ ! -f "$root/.claude/hooks/capture-decisions.sh" ] && [ -f "$root/../.claude/hooks/capture-decisions.sh" ]; then root="$root/.."; fi; bash "$root/.claude/hooks/capture-decisions.sh"'

bash -lc 'root="$PWD"; if [ ! -f "$root/.claude/hooks/normalize-decisions.sh" ] && [ -f "$root/../.claude/hooks/normalize-decisions.sh" ]; then root="$root/.."; fi; bash "$root/.claude/hooks/normalize-decisions.sh"'

preToolUse.command: bash -lc 'command -v rtk >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec rtk hook cursor; echo "{}"'
